security.csp: default-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost https:; img-src 'self' asset: http://asset.localhost data: blob: https:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' data: https://fonts.gstatic.com; script-src 'self'; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none'
security.devCsp: default-src 'self' http://localhost:*; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost http://localhost:* ws://localhost:* https:; img-src 'self' asset: http://asset.localhost data: blob: https:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' data: https://fonts.gstatic.com; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-eval'; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none'
